---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
What are you trying to do that the extension currently doesn't help with?

**Proposed solution**
Describe what you'd like to see. Be as concrete as you can — mock-ups, comparable behavior from another extension, etc.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you've tried, or alternative designs you can think of.

**Anything else?**
Screenshots, links, video clips — anything that helps.
